title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
scenario: Notification and Device Alert toggle states in App Settings > General > Notifications do not persist after closing and reopening the app
steps: Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications
Toggle some Notification settings ON and some OFF
Close the Notifications tab (navigate away and back)
Close and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app
Set all Notification toggles to ON
Repeat steps 4-7 (close/reopen tab, then close/reopen app)
Set all Notification toggles to OFF
Repeat steps 4-7 (close/reopen tab, then close/reopen app)
expected: All Notification and Device Alert toggle selections persist after closing/reopening the tab and after closing/reopening the app, regardless of whether toggles are mixed, all ON, or all OFF.
